substep.title: Ask If Not Provided
substep.ask:
What are we working on?
- **Planning mode**: provide a `status: ready` ticket reference (file path or canonical alias). I'll scaffold a new implementation bundle and run Q↔R / D / S / P.
- **Execution mode**: provide an existing implementation bundle directory path (e.g., `~/thoughts/.../implementations/2026-05-19-team-workspaces/`). I'll resume from the bundle's state and run I-phase orchestration.
Paste the path or alias.

substep.title: Classify Input Shape
substep.action:
Inspect {{raw_input}}:
- If it ends in `.md` AND the file's frontmatter has `kind: ticket` → PLANNING MODE. - If it is a directory AND contains a file matching `design-*.md` → EXECUTION MODE. - If it is a canonical alias matching `^ticket-` → resolve via `thoughts metadata` shared_folder + tickets//. → PLANNING MODE.
- Otherwise: halt with: "Cannot classify input {{raw_input}}. Expected a `status: ready` ticket path/alias (planning mode) or an implementation bundle directory (execution mode)."
Store as {{mode}} = "planning" | "execution".
